sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30083" key="e)gkaqo/rmisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκαθ-όρμισις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n30083.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">putting into harbour</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg001:1:18:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.18.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
